findings.name: Over-privileged custom role: 'Con Sales Operations Admin' gr
findings.message: Over-privileged custom role: 'Con Sales Operations Admin' grants Organization-level Delete on opportunity, quote, and salesorder plus write on pricelevel, exceeding what Sales Ops requires. Recommend downgrading to Business Unit scope and removing pricelevel write.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Unmanaged customization over a managed table: con_strategicd
findings.message: Unmanaged customization over a managed table: con_strategicdeal and con_renewalofid on the managed 'opportunity' table were added directly in the ContosoSales unmanaged solution in production, creating an active unmanaged layer over msdyn_SalesPro. Move these into a managed solution to avoid layering drift.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Untagged / unowned cloud flow: 'Contoso Lead Scoring & Routi
findings.message: Untagged / unowned cloud flow: 'Contoso Lead Scoring & Routing' runs under a maker's personal Dataverse connection rather than a service principal and is not in a solution, risking breakage if the maker leaves. Convert to solution-aware with a connection reference.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The custom role 'Con - CS Escalation Handler' grants organiz
findings.message: The custom role 'Con - CS Escalation Handler' grants organization-level Delete on incident and Write on queue, exceeding the least-privilege needed for escalation work. Recommend scoping Delete down to Business Unit and removing queue Write.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Custom columns con_channelsource and con_firstresponsemet on
findings.message: Custom columns con_channelsource and con_firstresponsemet on the managed 'incident' table were added in the unmanaged solution 'ContosoCustomerService' layered directly over msdyn_CustomerService, creating an unmanaged layer that will block clean managed uninstall. Move these into a dedicated managed extension solution.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Cloud flow 'Notify Manager on High-Priority Escalation' is u
findings.message: Cloud flow 'Notify Manager on High-Priority Escalation' is untagged and not added to any solution, so it exists only in the default solution and will not promote through ALM. Add it to ContosoCustomerService and set an owner connection reference.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Plugin 'Con.CaseRouting.EntitlementBinderPlugin' is register
findings.message: Plugin 'Con.CaseRouting.EntitlementBinderPlugin' is registered synchronously on both Create and Update of incident and performs entitlement-term decrement writes back to the parent entitlement, risking recursive Update loops and transaction timeouts under high case volume. Move the term decrement to an async step and add recursion guards.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Contoso Safety Compliance Officer' custom role grants o
findings.message: The 'Contoso Safety Compliance Officer' custom role grants organization-level Delete on msdyn_workorder, which exceeds the least-privilege intent (compliance officers only need Read/Append). The role should be scoped to Business Unit and Write-only on con_safetyinspection.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Unmanaged customization detected: con_slabreachrisk and con_
findings.message: Unmanaged customization detected: con_slabreachrisk and con_hazardsiteflag were added to the managed msdyn_workorder table directly in the default solution rather than the ContosoFieldService solution, creating an unmanaged layer over msdyn_FieldService that will complicate ALM promotion.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Truck Stock Replenishment Request' cloud flow is not co
findings.message: The 'Truck Stock Replenishment Request' cloud flow is not contained in the ContosoFieldService solution and has no solution owner/environment tag, so its Fin & Ops connection reference is a hidden dependency that will break on export to test/prod.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The Contoso.FieldService.SafetyInspectionGuardPlugin throws
findings.message: The Contoso.FieldService.SafetyInspectionGuardPlugin throws InvalidPluginExecutionException synchronously on bookableresourcebooking Create, duplicating the enforcement already performed by the 'Auto-Create Safety Inspection' real-time workflow; overlapping hard-stops on the same operation risk conflicting error messages and should be consolidated into a single enforcement point.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.
items: Auto-Create Safety Inspection for Hazardous Work Orders

findings.name: The con_marginalert and con_deliveryregion columns plus a mo
findings.message: The con_marginalert and con_deliveryregion columns plus a modified main form on msdyn_project exist in the unmanaged ContosoProjectOperations layer directly over the managed msdyn_ProjectServiceCore solution, creating an active unmanaged layer that will block Microsoft base-solution upgrades until resolved.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: con_Resourcing Desk Coordinator grants organization-level Wr
findings.message: con_Resourcing Desk Coordinator grants organization-level Write/Delete on msdyn_project and msdyn_actuals, far exceeding the resourcing persona's need (booked resources and team members only); recommend downgrading to Business Unit read and removing Delete on financial tables.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Contoso Time Entry Auto-Submit Reminder is not contained in
findings.message: Contoso Time Entry Auto-Submit Reminder is not contained in any solution (default-solution orphan) and its companion web resource uses deprecated Xrm.Page and unbound OData endpoint calls that are unsupported on the current client API version.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The con_ columns con_brandapprovalstatus and con_legalfooter
findings.message: The con_ columns con_brandapprovalstatus and con_legalfooterid on the managed msdynmkt_marketingemail table were added in an unmanaged layer directly in production, creating an unmanaged customization over a managed component. Move them into the ContosoMarketing solution and remove the unmanaged layer.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The custom Contoso Campaign Approver role grants organizatio
findings.message: The custom Contoso Campaign Approver role grants organization-level Delete on msdynmkt_marketingemail and msdynmkt_journey, far exceeding the approver persona which only needs Read/Append. Reduce to Business Unit scope and remove Delete.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The Campaign Brief Approval Routing cloud flow is not added
findings.componentType: Untagged cloud flow / missing solution dependency
findings.message: The Campaign Brief Approval Routing cloud flow is not added to the ContosoMarketing solution and references a connection reference that is missing as a solution dependency, so it will fail to import into test/prod. Add the flow and its connection references to the solution.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The custom columns con_churnriskband and con_loyaltytier wer
findings.message: The custom columns con_churnriskband and con_loyaltytier were added to the managed OOB table msdynci_customerprofile as unmanaged customizations directly in production, bypassing the managed ContosoCustomerInsights solution. This blocks clean solution upgrades of CI-Data and risks column loss on the next unification schema refresh.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Contoso Segment Activator' role grants Organization-lev
findings.message: The 'Contoso Segment Activator' role grants Organization-level Delete on msdynci_customerprofile, far exceeding its marketing-ops need (should be User/BU read-only). Combined with segment export, this is a data-exfiltration and GDPR risk.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'DSR Delete Propagation' cloud flow lives outside the Co
findings.componentType: Untagged cloud flow / missing solution dependency
findings.message: The 'DSR Delete Propagation' cloud flow lives outside the ContosoCustomerInsights solution and uses a personal (non-service-account) Dataverse connection reference, so it is untracked by the CoE and will break on the owner's departure - a compliance-critical erasure path with no ALM coverage.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The con_creditriskrating and con_ondunninghold columns and t
findings.message: The con_creditriskrating and con_ondunninghold columns and the 'Credit Risk Rating Business Rule' were added as UNMANAGED customizations directly on the managed 'account' table in production, layering over msdyn_FinanceAndOperations. These belong in the ContosoFinance solution to avoid layering conflicts on the next base upgrade.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The custom 'Accounts Payable Coordinator' role grants Organi
findings.message: The custom 'Accounts Payable Coordinator' role grants Organization-level Write/Delete on account and Delete on con_apapprovalrequest, far exceeding an AP clerk's need. Reduce to Business Unit read on account and remove Delete on approval requests.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Exchange Rate Sync Flow' runs in the default environmen
findings.message: The 'Exchange Rate Sync Flow' runs in the default environment outside any solution and uses an implicit HTTP connection with no owner tag, so it will not travel with ContosoFinance through ALM and risks orphaning on the connection owner's departure.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Vendor Invoice Post Realtime Workflow' writes back to t
findings.message: The 'Vendor Invoice Post Realtime Workflow' writes back to the F&O vendor invoice via dual-write synchronously; a dual-write outage will block the approval status transition. Consider moving the write-back to the CapexToFixedAssetPlugin-style async pattern to decouple the user-facing transaction.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Warehouse Worker' custom role grants organization-level
findings.message: The 'Warehouse Worker' custom role grants organization-level Delete on con_inventorycount and read across all con_vendor financials — far broader than the warehouse persona requires. Reduce con_vendor read to none and con_inventorycount delete to user/business-unit level.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Generate PO in F&O on Approval' cloud flow lives in the
findings.message: The 'Generate PO in F&O on Approval' cloud flow lives in the default environment's non-solution layer and is untagged — it is not in the ContosoSupplyChain solution, so it will not promote to test/prod and has no owning connection-reference governance.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.
items: Generate PO in F&O on Approval

findings.name: The 'InventoryLevelGauge' PCF control reads F&O InventSum th
findings.message: The 'InventoryLevelGauge' PCF control reads F&O InventSum through the product-form virtual entity using deprecated Xrm.Page and an unversioned OData v8.0 endpoint; migrate to formContext and the current Web API before the Xrm.Page removal deadline.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Global option set 'con_carrier' risks orphaning if con_shipm
findings.message: Global option set 'con_carrier' risks orphaning if con_shipment.con_carrier is repointed to a local choice — keep the shipment carrier field bound to this global set to avoid drift, or formally retire it.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Store Associate (POS)' custom role grants organization-
findings.message: The 'Store Associate (POS)' custom role grants organization-level Write and Delete on msdyn_retailtransaction and msdyn_giftcard, far exceeding the user/BU-level access a cashier needs. Over-privileged; scope Write down to Business Unit and remove Delete entirely.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Cloud flow 'Curbside Handoff Notification' uses an unmanaged
findings.message: Cloud flow 'Curbside Handoff Notification' uses an unmanaged Twilio connection with no connection reference or environment variable and lives in the default solution, so it is not carried by the ContosoCommerce solution ALM and will be lost on environment copy.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Unmanaged con_ columns (con_fraudscore, con_channelreference
findings.message: Unmanaged con_ columns (con_fraudscore, con_channelreference) were added directly to the managed dual-write table msdyn_retailtransaction in production, creating an unmanaged layer over a managed component that blocks clean uninstall of msdyn_Commerce.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The con_probationenddate and con_rehireeligible columns and
findings.message: The con_probationenddate and con_rehireeligible columns and the 'Probation End Reminder' workflow were added as unmanaged customizations directly on the managed cdm_employment table in production, bypassing the ContosoHumanResources solution ALM pipeline.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Contoso HR Business Partner' custom role grants organiz
findings.message: The 'Contoso HR Business Partner' custom role grants organization-level Read/Write on con_disciplinarycase, exposing confidential employee-relations data that should be restricted to the 'Contoso Employee Relations Specialist' role at user/owner level.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Termination Access Deprovisioning' cloud flow lives out
findings.componentType: Untagged cloud flow / missing solution dependency
findings.message: The 'Termination Access Deprovisioning' cloud flow lives outside a solution and calls the Offboarding-to-ServiceNow Logic App via a hardcoded HTTP action with no connection reference, creating an untracked dependency that breaks environment promotion.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Contoso CC Quality Analyst' custom role grants organiza
findings.message: The 'Contoso CC Quality Analyst' custom role grants organization-level Write on msdyn_ocliveworkitem (Conversation), exceeding least privilege - coaching analysts only need Read plus Write on con_agentcoachingnote.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Cloud flow 'Post-Conversation CSAT Survey Dispatch' is unman
findings.message: Cloud flow 'Post-Conversation CSAT Survey Dispatch' is unmanaged in the default solution and carries no environment/owner tag, creating an untracked dependency on the managed incident table.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Contoso added con_ columns (con_priorityscore, con_vipflag)
findings.message: Contoso added con_ columns (con_priorityscore, con_vipflag) directly onto the managed table msdyn_ocliveworkitem in the unmanaged ContosoContactCenter solution - an unmanaged layer over a managed component that complicates upgrades.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The custom role 'Con - CoE Data Protection Officer' grants O
findings.message: The custom role 'Con - CoE Data Protection Officer' grants Organization-level Delete on account and contact plus write on fieldsecurityprofile, exceeding least-privilege for a DPO reviewer. Recommend downgrading Delete to Business Unit and removing FSP write.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The con_securityreviewed and con_datastewardid columns were
findings.message: The con_securityreviewed and con_datastewardid columns were added as UNMANAGED customizations directly in Production over managed tables (adx_webpage, account), creating an active unmanaged layer that blocks clean managed-solution upgrades.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Orphaned Flow & App Detector' cloud flow uses a persona
findings.message: The 'Orphaned Flow & App Detector' cloud flow uses a personal (non-service-account) connectionreference and is untagged/uncertified (workflow.con_coecertified = false), risking breakage when the maker leaves.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: The 'Con.Governance.DataSensitivityGuardPlugin' Update step
findings.message: The 'Con.Governance.DataSensitivityGuardPlugin' Update step is registered synchronously (Pre-Operation) on account and contact; verify it is registered from a managed solution and not left as an unmanaged sdkmessageprocessingstep, and confirm sandbox isolation on its plugintype.
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate per CoE standards.

findings.name: Forms without a description
findings.message: 12 main forms have no description set.
findings.recommendation: Add a short description to each main form.
